summary: NEXUS v6.1 Testing Complete - Backend: 19/19 passed (100%), Frontend: All 4 Enterprise AI tabs working. Mistral Voxtral TTS integration fully functional. CRM ObjectId bug fixed. Fixed additional ObjectId bug in custom voice creation endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: Mistral Voxtral TTS integration correctly implements all 7 endpoints (capabilities, generate, custom voice, cross-lingual, benchmarks, history, voices)
CRM contact creation bug fix verified - contact.pop('_id', None) at line 168 working correctly
FIXED: Custom voice creation endpoint had same ObjectId serialization issue - added voice_profile.pop('_id', None)
Dynamic router auto-discovers and loads all hybrid services
MOCKED: Mistral TTS returns demo audio URLs (would call real Mistral API or local model in production)
MOCKED: Enterprise Slack meeting intelligence uses simulated AI analysis
updated_files: /app/backend/services/nexus_hybrid_mistral_tts.py - Fixed ObjectId serialization in create_custom_voice method (line 180)
/app/backend/tests/test_v61_mistral_tts.py - Created comprehensive test suite for v6.1 features

test_credentials.note: No specific credentials required - All endpoints work without authentication

seed_data_creation: Test contacts created with TEST_ prefix in enterprise_crm_contacts collection, custom voices in mistral_custom_voices collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: NEXUS v6.1 fully functional. Mistral Voxtral TTS (7 endpoints) working with mock audio generation. Enterprise Slack features (Research, CRM, Meetings, MCP) all working. 52 hybrid service files present. CRM ObjectId bug fixed. Custom voice ObjectId bug fixed by testing agent.

mistral_voxtral_tts.POST /api/v2/hybrid/mistral_tts/generate: WORKING - Tested en, fr, de, es languages
mistral_voxtral_tts.POST /api/v2/hybrid/mistral_tts/voice/cu: WORKING - Fixed ObjectId bug, creates custom voice profiles
mistral_voxtral_tts.GET /api/v2/hybrid/mistral_tts/history: WORKING - Returns generation history from MongoDB

enterprise_slack.POST /api/v2/hybrid/enterprise_slack/res: WORKING - Deep research with comprehensive depth
enterprise_slack.POST /api/v2/hybrid/enterprise_slack/mee: WORKING - Returns summary, action items, sentiment

frontend_enterprise_ai.page_load: WORKING - Enterprise AI Suite page loads correctly
frontend_enterprise_ai.deep_research_tab: WORKING - Query input, depth selector, results display
frontend_enterprise_ai.native_crm_tab: WORKING - Contact form, contact list with tags
frontend_enterprise_ai.meeting_intel_tab: WORKING - Transcript input, participants, analysis results
frontend_enterprise_ai.mcp_integration_tab: WORKING - 8 MCP servers displayed with status
